title: Stopping Motion along Z axis
description:
Stopping Motion along Z axis

Stopping Motion along Z axis

Use a trigger on the ZForce axis to stop the robot during Z axis motion.

For example:

' Set the force trigger to fire when force on Z axis is less than -10

Force_ClearTrigger

Force_SetTrigger FORCE_ZFORCE, -10, FORCE_LESS

Till Force

Jump P1

Speeds 1

Move P2 Till

You can combine other conditions with Force in the Till command:

Till Sw(1) = On Or Force

You can combine other force/torque conditions by calling Force_SetTrigger more than once.  In this case, clear all triggers first before setting them.

Force_ClearTrigger

Force_SetTrigger FORCE_ZFORCE, -10, FORCE_LESS

Force_SetTrigger FORCE_XFORCE, 5, FORCE_GREATER
examples:
' Set the force trigger to fire when force on Z axis is less than -10

Force_ClearTrigger
Force_SetTrigger FORCE_ZFORCE, -10, FORCE_LESS
Till Force
Jump P1
Speeds 1
Move P2 Till

Force_ClearTrigger
Force_SetTrigger FORCE_ZFORCE, -10, FORCE_LESS
Force_SetTrigger FORCE_XFORCE, 5, FORCE_GREATER
